query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: A nighttime winter scene in a parking lot with snow covering the ground. In the foreground, a dark station wagon is parked at an angle next to the rear portion of another vehicle. Behind them, a large white bus is visible in the mid-ground. Bare tree branches frame the left edge of the image. Several bright streetlights create pronounced starburst effects against the dark sky. A red neon sign reading "cora" in lowercase letters glows on the right side. Amber artificial light reflects off the metallic surfaces of the cars, the bus, and the snow.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A nighttime winter scene in a parking lot with snow on the ground, captured with extreme underexposure that crushes most of the frame into impenetrable blackness. A dark station wagon sits in the foreground beside the partially visible rear of another vehicle, while a large white bus behind them fades into the murky mid-ground. Bare tree branches frame the left edge. Bright streetlights explode with sharp starburst patterns against the void-like sky, and a red neon sign reading "cora" glows on the right. The entire scene is suffused with a sickly sodium-vapor orange cast that shifts the snow and vehicle surfaces into unsettling amber tones suggestive of contamination, permeating even the deepest shadows with an unnatural warmth.
